title: carex canescens f. subsubulosa
intro: Carex canescens f. subsubulosa, also known as the 'woolly sedge', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carex canescens f. subsubulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote sweating, and alleviate congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
